== Notes for [[Item:Q99816|Q99816]] ==

"Jews in Islamic Countries in the Middle Ages", Page 660, Volume 28 of Etudes sur le judaïsme médiéval, by Moshe Gil, David Strassler, Publisher BRILL, 2004, [ ISBN 900413882X, 9789004138827 ]

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD78D5B91EFBBFA9822EF79916C9945
geni:6000000018810154122

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
